blockingIssues.description: The no-external-URLs test in test/test_deep_upsert.py asserts only that ripgrep returned a non-zero exit code, so it passes both for the intended 'no matches' case (exit 1) and for ripgrep execution errors (exit 2), which means VAL-CROSS-002 is not reliably enforced.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the `python-library-worker` skill so its external-URL grep guidance matches this repository's `AGENTS.md`: scope the scan to the new test files rather than all of `test/`, because `test/test_ingest_f006.py` intentionally contains cached cassava references.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `integration-validation` found `.factory/skills/python-library-worker/SKILL.md` instructing workers to run `rg 'amazonaws|cassava\\.ucsd' test/`, while mission `AGENTS.md` explicitly narrows the check to `test/test_deep_upsert.py` and `test/test_generic_ingest.py`; worker session `2ab4beb0-b6f7-435a-b4f8-2484fef14a68` followed the mission guidance.
